description_en: The source states that there are four pseudo-fawasil, but it transmits them as two parenthetical clusters, each containing two phrases.
impact_en: The structured extraction splits the four places explicitly as separate phrases while preserving the compressed source wording in the raw entry block.

description_en: The first transmitted head, “الْمُبين,” appears without a displayed numeral.
impact_en: The recovered ordinal layer treats this as head 1 while preserving the witness’s lack of a displayed numeral.

description_en: Displayed 68 is transmitted in the parsed witness as “يعْمل ون”, with an internal space splitting the final letters.
impact_en: The recovered head normalizes only the internal spacing to “يعْملون”, while the raw source line is preserved unchanged for auditability.

description_en: The witness ends with a blank terminal display-total line written as “١١ - ١”.
impact_en: The terminal line is preserved as a display total only and is not treated as an additional head.

description_en: Because the transmitted block begins with an unnumbered first head and ends with a blank terminal total line, the displayed numerals do not by themselves encode the full later-Madani 111-head sequence.
impact_en: The dataset stores recovered later-Madani ordinals together with witness display numbers where present.
